name: Goth Tomboy Suprise
description:
Surprising one of your oldest friends you've known since high school, you offer her a birthday cake before they look at you weirdly and offer sex.

(Edit: It seems like a janitor mod had some more nerd rage in them and they got rid of one of the most tame bot images I've had on this site. Here's some more goth girl that the image system allows.)
creator: Dude11777
